requirements: Replace MacWhisper with direct Whisper CLI integration
Ensure proper error handling for the whisper CLI command
Update config file to support whisper CLI parameters
Ensure all shell scripts end with a newline character (POSIX requirement)
Rename 'extract_audio_for_macwhisper.sh' to 'extract_audio.sh' to reflect the new Whisper CLI integration
Make the Whisper CLI path handling consistent between config and code

output_examples.name: Whisper CLI Command Example
output_examples.description: Example command for using Whisper CLI

output_examples.name: POSIX Newline Check
output_examples.description: Script to check if files end with a newline character
output_examples.content:
# Check if a file ends with a newline
check_newline() {
  if [ -n "$(tail -c1 "$1")" ]; then
    echo "File $1 is missing a newline at the end"
    return 1
  fi
  return 0
}

# Ensure the file ends with a newline
ensure_newline() {
  if [ -n "$(tail -c1 "$1")" ]; then
    echo >> "$1"
    echo "Added newline to $1"
  fi
}

output_examples.name: Path Consistency Check
output_examples.description: Example of handling Whisper CLI path consistently
output_examples.content:
# Check if Whisper CLI is available
check_whisper_cli() {
  if [ -x "${WHISPER_CLI_PATH}" ]; then
    return 0
  elif command -v whisper >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    # If found in PATH, update the config variable
    WHISPER_CLI_PATH=$(command -v whisper)
    return 0
  else
    echo "Error: Whisper CLI not found at ${WHISPER_CLI_PATH} or in PATH" >&2
    return 1
  fi
}
